results.title: Mashed potatoes are a lot more flavourful if you ditch cream for a simpler ingredient
results.description: Mashed potatoes may seem like an easy side dish to make, but they can often turn out thick and glue-like because most people forget to add a simple ingredient that makes them smoother.
